channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: To Be Seen Is to Be Loved
item.description:
Lily, Rekha, Jordan, Grant, and Rachel play the party game Priorities and rank absurd items.

Duration: 49:30

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, lily du, rekha shankar, jordan myrick, grant o'brien, rachel pegram

item.title: Parlor Room Season 2 Trailer
item.description:
Get ready for a brand new season of chaos and board game shenanigans. Season 2 of Parlor Room premieres March 19th.

Duration: 02:18

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, katie marovitch
